backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining core types (CitizenID, EligibilityRecord) and state variables (balance, eligible map, paid set) with placeholder functions for citizen validation and money requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: admin kill-switch dashboard, transaction processing interface, and professional frontend UI with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing components for transaction processing, admin dashboard, layout, styling, and React Query hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes with security-focused blue palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jan-Dhan Gateway application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component with tab navigation between transaction processing (claim form and history) and admin dashboard views.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin control panel component displaying system status (Active/Paused/Frozen), emergency pause button, budget monitoring with progress bar, transaction counts, and active security features list.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout wrapper with header containing Jan-Dhan Gateway branding and security indicators, plus footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
Transaction submission form with Citizen ID input and scheme selection, displaying sequential validation through three gates (Eligibility, Budget, Frequency) with real-time status updates and approval/rejection results.
frontend/src/components/TransactionHisto: React component displaying a scrollable list of benefit claim transactions with status badges (approved/rejected), citizen details, scheme info, amounts, and rejection reasons using mock data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching system status (budget, transaction count, status) and transaction history from backend actor with polling and placeholder implementations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a trust-focused color palette (deep blue primary, teal accent) for both light and dark modes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom colors using OKLCH, typography settings, security-focused shadows, and custom animations for accordion and pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Jan-Dhan Gateway architecture with SHA-256 hashing, hash-linked ledger, three-gate validation system, admin controls, CSV integration, and tracking completed/pending features.
